description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, geometric design and a mix of white and beige exterior walls. The structure features multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with large windows and a spacious green lawn area. Several trees and landscaped elements are present around the property, enhancing its suburban feel. The house includes a driveway leading to a garage, and a curved walkway to the main entrance. The roof appears to have skylights or rooftop access, and the backyard is enclosed with a dark fence. The overall design emphasizes open space, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and beige walls, large windows, a garage, and landscaped green areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, multiple windows, and the backyard lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed backyard, flat roof, and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear look at the curved walkway, main entry, and surrounding greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, curved walkway, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping.
